---
id: authorization-group-role-assignments-controller-remove-group-role-assignments
title: "Remove group role assignments by criteria"
description: "Remove role assignments from a group that match the provided criteria. Returns 404 when no matching active assignment is found."
sidebar_label: "Remove group role assignments by criteria"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Remove group role assignments by criteria"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/authorization/groups/{group_id}/role_assignments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Remove role assignments from a group that match the provided criteria. Returns 404 when no matching active assignment is found.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
